name: Number 87: Queen of the Night
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>８７ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>美</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>び</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クイーン・オブ・ナイツ
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Hachijūnana Setsugekkabishin Kuīn Obu Naitsu
name_jp_tl: Numbers 87: Beautiful Goddess of the Four Seasons - Queen of Nights
desc:
3 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card, then activate 1 of these effects.
● Target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; while this card is face-up on the field, that Set card cannot be activated.
● Target 1 Plant monster on the field; change that target to face-down Defense Position.
● Target 1 face-up monster on the field; that target gains 300 ATK.
